rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score of 3/10 and rest on the same substantive reasoning: the candidate lacks Java/Kotlin/JVM and enterprise framework (Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate) expertise required by the role, while having a TypeScript/Node.js/DLang and C/C++ IDE background. The wording differs but the concerns, strengths, and conclusion are equivalent run-to-run variation. Nothing in the variant keys off the name change from Bogdan Szabo to Wei Chen.
